expectations.text: Provides exactly three subject line options
expectations.evidence: Response provides exactly three subject lines labeled 1, 2, and 3.

expectations.text: Each option takes a genuinely distinct angle and is labeled by angle (e.g. curiosity / benefit+offer / urgency)
expectations.evidence: Options are labeled 'Urgency', 'Curiosity', and 'Specificity/direct' — each a distinct angle.

expectations.text: Each subject line is under ~50 characters
expectations.evidence: All three subject lines are under 50 characters: '48 hours. Our best coffee deal of the year.' (43), 'We almost didn't send this email' (31), 'Black Friday: [X]% off your next 3 bags' (39).

expectations.text: Does not fabricate specific discount figures; flags if a real discount % is needed
expectations.evidence: Uses '[X]%' placeholder and notes: 'Fill in the actual discount figure — specific numbers consistently outperform vague language like "huge savings".'
